input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Echo AI addressed to VP_ENG. There is a separate thread with HEAD_DATA. Do NOT reference or CC HEAD_DATA.

dimensions.name: no_secondary_contact

metadata.notes: [P-022] VP Eng target. Head of Data is a separate contact; no mention.
